text:
is a teacher at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Anka has brown kempt hair that is tucked behind her ears, and golden-brown eyes. She is seen wearing a white lab coat over a pink shirt and light blue pants.

Story

Anka attends the first years' entrance ceremony.

After Titans appear and steal all of the festival food stands, Anka later attends a meeting with other teachers to discuss the situation subsequent to Eren Jaeger's successful attempt against the principal.
